generated_for: Paradiso AI safe automation — PR A (source monitoring skeleton)
notes: This registry is the allow-list of official sources Paradiso monitors.
It is read by scripts/check_source_updates.py only. No production code
path reads this file. Adding or removing an entry never changes /api/ask
behavior on its own — a separate, human-reviewed PR is required to
promote any source-derived content into the active grounding fixture.
URLs marked status=not_configured are placeholders that must be
confirmed by a human reviewer before any HTTP fetch is attempted.
Scripts must skip such entries unless an explicit --allow-network
